com.saxonica.ee.stream.feed

Interface FeedMaker

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AdjacentTextNodeMergerAdjunct, ApplyTemplatesAdjunct, AtomicSequenceConverterAdjunct, AtomizerAdjunct, BlockAdjunct, BooleanFnAdjunct, CardinalityCheckerAdjunct, ChooseAdjunct, CodepointsToStringAdjunct, CopyAdjunct, CopyOfAdjunct, CountAdjunct, CurrentGroupAdjunct, CurrentMergeGroupAdjunct, DeepEqualAdjunct, DistinctValuesAdjunct, DocumentInstrAdjunct, DocumentSorterAdjunct, ElementCreatorAdjunct, EmptyAdjunct, EmptyTextNodeRemoverAdjunct, ExistsAdjunct, FilterExpressionAdjunct, FilterFnAdjunct, FilteringAdjunct, FirstItemExpressionAdjunct, FoldAdjunct, ForEachAdjunct, ForEachGroupAdjunct, ForExpressionAdjunct, IndexOfAdjunct, InsertBeforeAdjunct, InstanceOfAdjunct, ItemCheckerAdjunct, IterateAdjunct, LiteralAdjunct, MapEntryAdjunct, MinimaxAdjunct, NewMapAdjunct, NotFnAdjunct, OutermostAdjunct, RemoveAdjunct, ResultDocumentAdjunct, SimpleNodeConstructorAdjunct, SnapshotFnAdjunct, SubsequenceAdjunct, SumAdjunct, TailExpressionAdjunct, TraceAdjunct, TransmissionAdjunct, TreatFnAdjunct, TryCatchAdjunct

    public interface FeedMaker
    An expression that can be evaluated in streaming mode is represented at compile time by a list of FeedMaker objects. At run-time, the makeFeed() method on each of these objects is called to create a list of Feed objects, representing the evaluation pipeline. The output of the Watch that monitors the actual parsing events is then fed into this pipeline, which eventually delivers its result in the current SequenceReceiver of the XPathContext object.

    • Method Summary
